title: KATHMANDU COUNTRYSIDE HIKE
tagline: An exciting countryside experience
highlights: Short and easy trekking near Kathmandu valley
Spectacular mountainous view
Insightful and architectural Namo Buddha monastery
Traditional life style of local people & culture
Buddhist norms, meditation and yoga activities
Mixture lifestyle of Aryan, Tibetan & Newari culture
description: Chisapani-Nagarkot-Dhulikhel-Namo Buddha- Kathmandu trek is one of the easier trekking trail in Nepal designed to explore nature and culture of Nepal’s countryside and the amazing mountain views. This trek is also known as Around Kathmandu Valley Trek. It is an excellent trek for those who wish to avoid a long, strenuous trek or have time only for a short and easy trek and fit for all age group and for all seasons.

itinerary.title: Drive to Sundarijal & trek to Chisapani (2160m)
itinerary.desc: Take a short drive from Kathmandu to Sundarijal and start our trekking to Chisapani where you will be enjoying the real beauty of nature with the Himalayan view.

itinerary.title: Chisopani – Nagarkot (2175m)
itinerary.desc: Today we hike towards Nagarkot. It is the famous panoramic hillside from where we can get picturesque view of sunrise and sunset.

itinerary.title: Nagarkot – Dhulikhel (1550m)
itinerary.desc: Our journey continues to Dhulikhel from Nagarkot. Dhulikhel is the trade hub for the surrounding places and ancient Nepal- Tibet trade point where we can see the Newari and Nepali lifestyle.

itinerary.title: Dhulikhel – Namo Buddha (1810m)
itinerary.desc: The trail proceeds through unspoiled villages. Eventually, after 5/6 hrs treks bring you to a Tibetan Buddhist village Namobuddha with beautiful chorten and monastery.

itinerary.title: Namo Buddha – Panauti – Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Trek to legendary village Panauti and explore ancient temples. After lunch drive to historical heritage site Bhaktapur and then back to Kathmandu.

title: FAMILY HOLIDAY
tagline: An exciting Tour with Kids
highlights: UNESCO world heritage sites in Kathmandu
Chandragiri Hill Cable Car Tour
Trishuli River Rafting experience
Wildlife Safari in Chitwan National Park
4 days trekking to Ghorepani Poonhill
Lake city Pokhara exploration
description: This is an outstanding tour package to spend a quality holiday with your family around the Himalaya. The holiday with your family and kids in Nepal starts from the capital city of Kathmandu, traveling through scenic Pokhara, wild Chitwan, and completing with a beautiful trek to Poonhill.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Arrival at Tribhuvan International Airport, transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit Boudhanath Stupa, Swayambhunath, Bhaktapur Durbar Square, and Patan Durbar Square.

itinerary.title: Chandragiri Hill Cable Car Tour
itinerary.desc: Drive towards Thankot for a cable car tour with panoramic views of Kathmandu valley and Himalayan ranges.

itinerary.title: Trishuli Rafting - Drive to Chitwan
itinerary.desc: Fun filled rafting from Fishling to Kurintar, then drive towards Chitwan National Park.

itinerary.title: Chitwan Jungle Activities
itinerary.desc: Elephant ride, canoe ride, bird watching, elephant bathing, and village tour.

itinerary.title: Chitwan - Pokhara Drive
itinerary.desc: Short bird watching at Chitwan, drive to Pokhara, and boating tour at Fewa Lake.

itinerary.title: Drive to Naya Pul and trek to Ulleri
itinerary.desc: Start the trekking portion of the trip with an amazing view on the trail.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ulleri to Ghorepani
itinerary.desc: Walk through lush forests with exclusive mountain views of Annapurna South.

itinerary.title: Sunrise at Poon Hill & trek to Ghandruk
itinerary.desc: 45 minutes upward hike to Poon Hill for a mighty Himalayan sunrise view.

itinerary.title: Trek from Ghandruk back to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Head back to Naya Pul through green forests and drive back to Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing & fly to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Sunrise at Sarangkot, city tour (Davis Fall, Gupteswor Cave), and short flight back to Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to the airport for final departure.

title: LUMBINI TOUR
tagline: An exciting heritage experience
highlights: UNESCO world heritage site
Birth place of Gautam Buddha
Central attraction for Buddhist pilgrimage
Mayadevi temple from 3rd century
Ashoka pillar from 249 B.C
International Buddhist monasteries
description: Lumbini is one of the popular tourist destinations of Nepal. It is the birthplace of Gautam Buddha, famously known as the capital of Buddhism, situated in the Southern Terai at an altitude of 600 ft.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Scenic 7-8 hours drive to Lumbini. Stroll around the local market in the evening.

itinerary.title: Explore Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Visit Lumbini Garden, Maya Devi Temple, Pushkarni Pool, and various international monasteries (Thai, Sri Lankan, Chinese, etc.).

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: 7-8 hours scenic drive back to Kathmandu with views of Himalayas, rivers, and jungles.

tagline: An exciting Jungle Safari
highlights: Elephant Safari and Jeep Drive
Canoe ride along the Rapti River
Tharu Cultural Program and Village Tour
Bird Watching and Elephant Breeding Center
Chance to see Rhino, Tiger, and Crocodile
description: Chitwan is one of the most adventurous and exciting places in Nepal. The major activities during the safari are focused on being part of the wild nature while staying in luxury accommodations.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Tharu Village Tour
itinerary.desc: Village tour, National Park Visitor's center, sunset view, and Tharu cultural dance.

itinerary.title: Canoe Ride & Elephant Safari
itinerary.desc: Morning canoe ride, bird watching, crocodile spotting, and afternoon elephant safari to see rhinos and other wildlife.

itinerary.title: Elephant Breeding Center & Departure
itinerary.desc: Visit the Government Elephant Breeding Centre before departure.

itinerary.title: Sarangkot Sunrise

itinerary.title: Leisure Day in Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Boating on Phewa Lake or optional adventure activities.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Return journey along the Prithvi Highway.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Shopping or rest.

itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport.

title: BADIMALIKA TOUR
tagline: An exciting Village experience
highlights: Sacred Badimalika Temple (4214m)
Khaptad National Park exploration
Remote Far-Western Nepal immersion
Unique religious significance (Tribeni)
High-altitude grasslands and forests
description: A deep spiritual and natural journey to the remote Far-Western region of Nepal, exploring high-altitude temples and the biodiverse Khaptad National Park.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Dadeldhura
itinerary.desc: Flight to Nepalgunj, then Dhangadhi, and drive to the hills of Dadeldhura.

itinerary.title: Approach to the Temple

itinerary.title: Tribeni & Badimalika Temple

4WD Off-road Jeep adventure
Exotic Karnali region exploration
Sinja Valley historical site
Stunning Alpine scenery
description: Rara Lake Tour is one of the best destinations for wild travelers. The 4WD Jeep tour is a fascinating adventure overland journey to the exotic and stunning natural beauty of the biggest lake in Nepal.

itinerary.desc: Long drive through rivers and Terai region to reach Surkhet.

itinerary.desc: Drive through subtropical vegetation and green valleys to Kalikot.

Patan Durbar Square (Art & Architecture)
UNESCO World Heritage Site exploration

itinerary.title: Pashupatinath & Boudhanath
itinerary.desc: Visit the holiest Hindu temple on the Bagmati bank and the largest stupa in Nepal.

itinerary.title: Swayambhunath & Patan
itinerary.desc: Panoramic views from the hill-top temple and explore the artistic palaces of Patan Durbar Square.

title: Trek to Mount Everest
tagline: Sagarmatha National Park - A World Heritage Experience
highlights: UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1979
Home to the top of the world - Sagarmatha (8,848m)
Explore famed Sherpa culture and Tengboche monastery
Rich Flora: Pine, Hemlock, Juniper, and Rhododendron
Diverse Fauna: Snow Leopard, Red Panda, and Musk Deer
Views of Lhotse, Cho Oyu, and Amadablam
description: Sagarmatha (Mt. Everest) National Park, established in 1976, covers 1,148 sq. km of the Himalayan ecological zone in the Khumbu region of Nepal. Ranging from 2,845m at Monjo to 8,848m at the summit of Everest, the park features rugged terrain, deep gorges, and some of the world's highest peaks. The famed Sherpa people live here, their lives deeply interwoven with Buddhism, centered around historic monasteries like Tengboche, Thame, and Pangboche. The park is home to the red panda, snow leopard, musk deer, Himalayan tahr, and over 118 species of birds including the Impeyan pheasant.

subPackages.name: AMADABLAM BASE CAMP
subPackages.details: A stunning trek to the base of one of the world's most beautiful mountains. Experience Sherpa hospitality and iconic Himalayan vistas.

subPackages.name: EVEREST BASE CAMP AND KALA PATHHAR
subPackages.details: The classic journey to the foot of Everest. Reach Kala Patthar for the most famous view of the world's highest peak.

subPackages.name: EVEREST PIKEY PEAK
subPackages.details: A shorter trek offering one of the best panoramic views of Everest and the surrounding ranges from a lower altitude.

subPackages.name: EVEREST (3 HIGH PASSES)
subPackages.details: The ultimate Everest challenge. Crossing Kongma La, Cho La, and Renjo La for a complete Khumbu circuit.

subPackages.name: TREK TO PHAPLU EVEREST BASE CAMP
subPackages.details: A traditional approach to EBC, following the old trail used by early expeditions before the Lukla airport was built.

title: Trek to Annapurna
tagline: Annapurna Conservation Area - A Sanctuary of Natural & Cultural Wonders
highlights: Thorong-la Pass: Legendary high-altitude pass (5,416m)
Kali Gandaki Gorge: The deepest gorge in the world
Muktinath Temple: Sacred pilgrimage site for Hindus & Buddhists
Tilicho Lake: One of the highest lakes in the world (4,919m)
Mosaic of Gurung, Magar, and Manangi communities
Gateway through Pokhara: The beautiful 'City of Lakes'
description: The Annapurna region of western Nepal is a world-renowned trekking destination, protected under the Annapurna Conservation Area Project (ACAP). Dominated by peaks like Annapurna I-IV, Dhaulagiri, and Machhapuchhre, the region features extreme elevational diversity—from sub-tropical lowland forests of oak and rhododendron to high alpine meadows and windswept desert plateaus bordering Tibet. Culturally, it is a treasure trove of Himalayan Buddhism and Hinduism, home to ancient monasteries and traditional festivals like Yartung.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA CIRCUIT WITH TILICHO LAKE
subPackages.details: A comprehensive journey circling the entire Annapurna massif, including a challenging detour to the turquoise waters of Tilicho Lake.

subPackages.name: TREK TO ANNAPURNA WITH NAMUN LA PASS
subPackages.details: A challenging off-the-beaten-path trek over the Namun La Pass (5,560m), connecting the Lamjung and Manang regions.

subPackages.name: LAMJUNG HIMAL TREK
subPackages.details: A quieter camping adventure offering unobstructed views of Manaslu and the Annapurna range through pristine Gurung villages.

subPackages.name: KHOPRA RIDGE TREK
subPackages.details: An excellent alternative to busier trails, offering incredible panoramic views of Dhaulagiri and a visit to the sacred Khayer Lake.

subPackages.name: MARDI HIMAL TREK
subPackages.details: A popular 'eco-trek' following a ridgeline toward the base of Machhapuchhre, offering some of the closest mountain views available.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA BASE CAMP - SHORT TRIP
subPackages.details: A fast-paced version of the sanctuary trek, ideal for those with limited time who still wish to stand at the foot of the world's 10th highest peak.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA CIRCUIT WITH NAR-PHU VALLEY
subPackages.details: An epic odyssey into the restricted Nar-Phu valleys, crossing Kang La and Thorong La for a complete Himalayan immersion.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA BASE CAMP VIA GHOREPANI
subPackages.details: A classic trek combining the famous sunrise views from Poon Hill with a deep trek into the Annapurna Sanctuary's natural amphitheater.

subPackages.name: ANNAPURNA SEVEN PASSES TREK
subPackages.details: The ultimate challenge crossing seven high-altitude passes, bypassing road-heavy sections for a true wilderness experience.

title: Trek to Langtang
tagline: The Valley of Glaciers & Tamang Culture
highlights: Kyanjin Gompa: Famous Buddhist monastery at 3,870m
Tserko Ri (4,984m): Incredible panoramic views of Langtang Lirung
Authentic Tamang Culture and hospitality
Red Panda Habitat: Exploring the dense forests of the National Park
Stunning Alpine landscapes and high-altitude lakes (Gosainkunda)
description: Langtang Valley, located north of Kathmandu, is a hidden gem offering spectacular mountain views, ancient monasteries, and a deep look into Tamang culture. Despite the 2015 earthquake, the valley has rebuilt stronger than ever, offering a resilient and welcoming spirit.

subPackages.name: LANGTANG VALLEY TREK
subPackages.details: The classic journey to Kyanjin Gompa and Tserko Ri.

subPackages.name: GOSAINKUNDA LAKE TREK
subPackages.details: A spiritual trek to the sacred alpine lakes of Gosainkunda.

subPackages.name: TAMANG HERITAGE TRAIL
subPackages.details: A cultural journey through traditional Tamang villages.

description: Upper Mustang, once a separate kingdom, is a high-altitude desert region bordering Tibet. Known for its stark beauty and deep-rooted Tibetan culture, this restricted region requires a special permit.

itinerary.title: Drive to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Drive to Pokhara. Boating at Phewa Lake, visit Tal Barahi Temple and walk around Lakeside.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Cultural and Village Tour
itinerary.desc: Visit International Mountain Museum and traditional Gurung/Magar villages. Enjoy cultural performances.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Fly or drive back to Kathmandu. Shopping time. Farewell cultural dinner with traditional music.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport before 3 hours of your flight for final departure.

title: NEPAL SPIRITUAL TOUR
tagline: Follow the path of peace across Hindus and Buddhist holylands
highlights: Experience Hindu and Buddhist traditions at sacred heritage sites
Spiritual reflection and overnight stay at Namobuddha pilgrimage site
Explore the birthplace of Lord Buddha at Maya Devi Temple in Lumbini
description: A deeply spiritual tour taking you to the most sacred Buddhist and Hindu pilgrimage sites in Nepal, including Pashupatinath, Boudhanath, Namobuddha, and Lumbini.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome and transfer to hotel. Evening free to feel the spiritual atmosphere.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Spiritual Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit Pashupatinath, Boudhanath, Swayambhunath, and Budhanilkantha. Experience rituals and prayers.

itinerary.title: Drive to Namobuddha
itinerary.desc: Drive to Namobuddha, a sacred Buddhist site. Explore monastery, meditation areas. Stay overnight.

itinerary.title: Drive to Kathmandu via Bhaktapur
itinerary.desc: Drive back to Kathmandu via Bhaktapur Durbar Square. Explore ancient temples and cultural heritage.

itinerary.title: Fly/Drive to Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Travel to Lumbini, the birthplace of Lord Buddha. Relax and enjoy peaceful meditation surroundings.

itinerary.title: Lumbini Spiritual Exploration
itinerary.desc: Visit sacred Maya Devi Temple, Ashoka Pillar, monastic zones, and international temples.

itinerary.title: Return to Kathmandu and Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Fly/drive back to Kathmandu. Transfer to airport 3 hours prior to your flight.

title: MUKTINATH SPIRITUAL TOUR
tagline: Revered trans-Himalayan pilgrimage and holy-baths tour
highlights: Pashupatinath Temple and Guheshwori Shakti Peetha Darshan
Adventurous Jeep drive to trans-Himalayan Jomsom and Muktinath
Take holy bath under 108 water spouts (Mukti Dhara) and 2 Mukti Kundas
Manakamana Goddess Temple visit via scenic Cable Car ride
description: A highly revered pilgrimage tour to the holy temple of Muktinath in the trans-Himalayan Jomsom region, visiting Pashupatinath and Manakamana along the way.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Arrival & Pashupatinath Darshan
itinerary.desc: Airport arrival, transfer to hotel. Evening visit to Guheshwori Shakti Peetha and Pashupatinath Temple.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Drive to Pokhara by private jeep (206 km, 8-9 hrs). Enjoy scenic green hills, rivers and villages.

itinerary.title: Drive Pokhara to Muktinath & Stay at Jomsom
itinerary.desc: Drive to Muktinath (195 km, 8-9 hrs). Enjoy trans-Himalayan vistas. Perform rituals, take holy baths under 108 Dhara. Drive to Jomsom.

itinerary.title: Drive Jomsom to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Drive back to Pokhara (7-8 hrs). Enroute visit Lete, Rupse Waterfall, hot spring, and Kushma suspension bridge.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Local Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Explore Pokhara: Bindabasini Temple, Seti River, Devi's Fall, Gupteshwor Cave, and Pumdikot Mahadev.

itinerary.title: Manakamana Darshan and Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Drive back to Kathmandu. Enroute visit sacred Manakamana Temple via cable car. Transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Breakfast, hotel checkout, and transfer to airport 3 hours before flight.

title: JEEP TOUR TO RARA (8 DAYS)
tagline: Epic 4WD off-road journey to the blue gem of Mid-West Nepal
highlights: Adventurous off-road driving through remote villages and valleys
Drive along the bank of the wild Karnali River
Enjoy spectacular views and boating in the crystal-clear Rara Lake
description: An adventurous 4WD off-road jeep tour through the remote landscapes of Mid-Western Nepal to the pristine and magnificent Rara Lake.

itinerary.title: Arrival to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome at airport and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Drive to Surkhet (1400 M to 875 M)
itinerary.desc: Drive from Kathmandu to Surkhet passing Trishuli River, Terai plains, Chitwan and Butwal.

itinerary.title: Drive from Surkhet to Kalikot (2034 M)
itinerary.desc: Drive through dense subtropical forests and green valleys to reach Manma, Kalikot.

itinerary.title: Drive from Kalikot to Rara Lake (2990 M)
itinerary.desc: Drive along Karnali River to Talca Airport. Park jeep and walk 30 minutes to Rara Lake.

itinerary.title: Full-day Excursion in Rara Lake
itinerary.desc: Boating in Rara Lake, hiking to the ridge for panoramic views, and exploring national park.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kalikot
itinerary.desc: Drive back to Manma, Kalikot. Evening village exploration.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Drive back from Kalikot to Kathmandu through scenic highway.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport for departure.

title: BHOTEKOSHI RIVER RAFTING
tagline: Adrenaline-fueled grade 4 white water river action
highlights: Thrilling grade 4 white water rapids and exciting flips
Rafting from Lomosangu through stunning canyon landscapes
Beachside camping and night stay beside the flowing river
description: Experience the thrill of white-water rafting in the wild Bhote Koshi River, one of the most exciting grade 4 rafting rivers in Nepal.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu to Lomosangu
itinerary.desc: Drive to Lomosangu. Safety briefing, then raft through thrilling rapids. Camp and stay overnight at Barhabise.

itinerary.title: Full Day Rafting Adventure
itinerary.desc: Raft through great rapids for about 95 miles. Finish trip near Dolalghat and drive back to Kathmandu.

title: TRISHULI RIVER RAFTING
tagline: Scenic river canyon cruising and river beachside camping
highlights: Enjoyable rapids and beautiful river-beach landscape
Overnight camping at Fishling village with music and campfires
Fascinating river action through forested canyons
description: A classic white-water rafting experience on the Trishuli River, perfect for beginners and families seeking a scenic river adventure.

itinerary.title: Travel to Rafting Point Chaurandi
itinerary.desc: Drive to Chaurandi. Raft through canyons, rapids and reach Fishling village. Setup tents, dinner and campfire activities.

itinerary.title: Main Day Rafting
itinerary.desc: Raft 4-5 hours in water. Enjoy rapids, witness Marsyangdi-Trishuli confluence at Mugling, end at Gaighat, and return to Kathmandu.

title: BUNGEE JUMPING
tagline: The ultimate 160m free-fall over the wild Himalayan canyon
highlights: Ultimate 160m free fall over the raging Bhote Koshi River
Includes round-trip tourist bus transportation from Thamel
Full safety briefing and equipment check by professional crew
description: Take the ultimate leap of faith with a thrilling 160-meter bungee jump over the wild Bhote Koshi River canyon from a premium suspension bridge.

itinerary.title: Bungee Jump Day Trip
itinerary.desc: Leave Thamel at 6:00 AM. Arrive at resort, weight check, safety briefing, and take the ultimate jump. Return to Kathmandu in the evening.

title: BUDDHIST PILGRIMAGE TOUR
tagline: Follow the path of enlightenment across Nepal's holiest Buddhist lands
highlights: Visit historic Swayambhunath Stupa (Monkey Temple) and Boudhanath Stupa
Explore Kopan Monastery and attend meditation courses
Visit Namobuddha monastery, where Buddha offered his body to a starving tigress
Journey to Lumbini (birthplace of Lord Buddha) and explore Tilaurakot palace
description: A spiritual journey trace the footsteps of Lord Buddha across the most holy Buddhist pilgrimage sites in Nepal, including Swayambhunath, Boudhanath, Kopan, Namobuddha, and Lumbini.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Warm greeting at airport and transfer to hotel in Thamel.

itinerary.title: Full Day Sightseeing of World Heritage Cultural Sites
itinerary.desc: Visit Swayambhunath Stupa, Boudhanath Stupa, and Kopan Monastery. Explore Buddhist art and architecture.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing Patan City and Namobuddha
itinerary.desc: Visit Patan City's Golden Temple, then drive to Namobuddha. Explore the monastery and stay overnight.

itinerary.title: Drive to Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Drive (or take a short flight) from Kathmandu to Bhairahawa/Lumbini. Transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Lumbini Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Explore Lumbini: Maya Devi temple, Ashoka Pillar, sacred pond, and international monasteries.

itinerary.title: Day Tour to Tilaurakot
itinerary.desc: Visit Tilaurakot (where Buddha lived for 29 years). Visit Gotihawa brick stupa and Ashoka pillar. Return to Lumbini.

itinerary.title: Lumbini to Kathmandu & Pharping Monastery
itinerary.desc: Fly back to Kathmandu. Drive to Pharping Monastery and explore the sacred cave and village. Evening shopping in Thamel.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Airport transfer according to flight schedule.

title: ANNAPURNA CHITWAN HOLIDAYS
tagline: Classic sightseeing, a 4-day Annapurna trek, and wild safaris combined
highlights: Sunrise and mountain views of Annapurna, Dhaulagiri, and Fishtail from Poon Hill
Trek through beautiful Gurung villages like Ghandruk, Landruk and Dhampus
Jungle activities, jeep safari, and Tharu cultural experience in Chitwan
description: The ultimate 12-day vacation combining cultural sightseeing, a classic 4-day trek to Ghorepani Poon Hill, and a wildlife safari in Chitwan National Park.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Welcome at airport and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Drive to Nagarkot & Bhaktapur Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Drive to Nagarkot for panoramic Himalayan views. Visit historic Bhaktapur Durbar Square.

itinerary.title: Drive to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Drive to Pokhara. Explore lakeside and enjoy Phewa lake boating.

itinerary.title: Drive to Nayapul and Trek to Tikhedhunga
itinerary.desc: Drive to Nayapul and begin scenic trek to Tikhedhunga passing Birethanti.

itinerary.title: Trek to Ghorepani
itinerary.desc: Trek to Ghorepani via Ulleri village. Enjoy spectacular mountain vistas.

itinerary.title: Trek to Tadapani
itinerary.desc: Sunrise hike to Poon Hill. Post-breakfast, trek through oak forests to Tadapani.

itinerary.title: Trek to Landruk
itinerary.desc: Trek down to Landruk village passing Annapurna conservation museum and Modi River.

itinerary.title: Trek to Dhampus and Drive Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Trek to Dhampus via Tolka. Drive to Pokhara.

itinerary.title: Drive Pokhara to Chitwan
itinerary.desc: Drive to Chitwan National Park. Evening Tharu cultural dance show.

itinerary.title: Chitwan Exploration Day
itinerary.desc: Jeep safari, jungle walk, and boating in Rapti River to see crocodiles and birds.

itinerary.title: Drive to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Drive back to Kathmandu. Evening free for shopping.

itinerary.title: Departure Day
itinerary.desc: Transfer to international airport for departure flight.

title: UPPER MUSTANG TOUR
tagline: Unveil the ancient forbidden walled city of Lo Manthang by 4WD
highlights: Jeep drive along the deep Kali Gandaki gorge
Explore the walled city of Lo Manthang and the sky caves of Chhosar
Visit ancient monasteries like Namgyal Gompa and Jampa Gompa
description: An adventurous tour into the forbidden kingdom of Lo Manthang in Upper Mustang, exploring ancient sky caves, centuries-old Tibetan Buddhist monasteries, and spectacular dry deserts.

itinerary.title: Drive Kathmandu to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Drive to Pokhara with beautiful countryside views.

itinerary.title: Drive to Tatopani
itinerary.desc: Drive west to Tatopani passing Beni. Experience natural hot springs.

itinerary.title: Drive to Kagbeni & Muktinath
itinerary.desc: Drive to Kagbeni village and Muktinath Temple. Stay overnight at Kagbeni.

itinerary.title: Drive to Ghami Village
itinerary.desc: Permit check at Kagbeni, cross Kali Gandaki, and drive to Ghami via Samar and Syangboche.

itinerary.title: Drive to Lo-Mangthang
itinerary.desc: Visit Mustang Ghar Gompa, Charang monastery, and enter the walled city of Lo Manthang.

itinerary.title: Exploration in Lo-Manthang and Chhosar
itinerary.desc: Explore Namgyal Gompa, the 3,000-year-old sky caves of Chhoser. Return to Lo Manthang.

itinerary.title: Drive back to Jomsom
itinerary.desc: Drive back to Jomsom. Evening free to explore local Jomsom markets.

itinerary.title: Drive to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Drive back to Pokhara. Afternoon local Pokhara sightseeing.

itinerary.title: Drive to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Drive back to Kathmandu (5 hours). Enjoy farewell dinner.

title: FAMILY HOLIDAYS IN NEPAL
tagline: Scenic, comfortable, and luxury family leisure trip with zero trekking
highlights: Perfect leisure vacation for families with kids and elderly members
Sunrise and mountain panoramas from Nagarkot and Sarangkot
Boating on Lake Phewa, jungle activities in Chitwan, and Newari culture in Bandipur
description: A premium, leisure family vacation across Kathmandu, Nagarkot, Pokhara, Chitwan, and the historic hilltop town of Bandipur, with absolutely no strenuous trekking required.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Arrival, welcome, and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit UNESCO sites: Boudhanath Stupa, Pashupatinath Temple, Swayambhunath and Bhaktapur.

itinerary.title: Chandragiri Hill Cable Car Tour
itinerary.desc: Cable car tour at Chandragiri Hills. Breathtaking Himalayan views.

itinerary.title: Drive to Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Drive to Pokhara. Boating on Phewa Lake and Lakeside walk.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Sarangkot sunrise. Visit Davis Falls, Gupteshwor Cave, and International Mountain Museum.

itinerary.title: Leisure and Adventure in Pokhara
itinerary.desc: Free day. Optional adventure activities: paragliding, cycling, or lakeside relaxation.

itinerary.title: Drive to Chitwan
itinerary.desc: Drive to Chitwan National Park. Evening village walk and Tharu cultural show.

itinerary.title: Chitwan Jungle Activities
itinerary.desc: Jeep safari, canoe ride, bird watching, elephant breeding center visit, and nature walk.

itinerary.title: Drive to Bandipur
itinerary.desc: Drive to the historic hilltop Newari town of Bandipur. Sunset views.

itinerary.title: Drive Back to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Drive back to Kathmandu. Free time for shopping and leisure.

itinerary.title: Free Day in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Leisure day. Explore markets in Thamel, shopping, and relaxation with family.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to international airport for departure flight.

title: UNESCO WORLD HERITAGE TOUR
tagline: Uncover Nepal's iconic UNESCO designated historical & natural treasures
highlights: Guided tours of seven historical UNESCO sites in Kathmandu Valley
Visit Chitwan National Park (UNESCO Natural World Heritage Site)
Journey to sacred Lumbini (UNESCO Cultural World Heritage Site)
description: Explore Nepal's rich historical, cultural, and natural heritage sites recognized by UNESCO, including major temples in Kathmandu, Chitwan National Park, and sacred Lumbini.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Arrival, welcome, and transfer to hotel.

itinerary.title: Kathmandu UNESCO Heritage Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Visit Kathmandu Durbar Square, Swayambhunath, Pashupatinath, and Boudhanath.

itinerary.title: Patan and Bhaktapur Heritage Tour
itinerary.desc: Visit Patan Durbar Square and Bhaktapur Durbar Square. Explore ancient art and Newari architecture.

itinerary.title: Drive to Chitwan National Park
itinerary.desc: Drive to Chitwan. Evening Tharu cultural show and village walk.

itinerary.title: Chitwan Jungle Activities
itinerary.desc: Full day jungle safari, canoe ride, bird watching, and nature walk inside Chitwan.

itinerary.title: Drive/Fly to Lumbini
itinerary.desc: Drive or fly to Lumbini. Evening free for peaceful exploration.

itinerary.title: Lumbini Sightseeing and Return to Kathmandu
itinerary.desc: Visit sacred Maya Devi Temple, Ashoka Pillar, and monasteries. Fly or drive back to Kathmandu.

itinerary.title: Final Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to airport before 3 hours of your flight.

title: POKHARA TOUR
tagline: Discover the scenic lake city and close up Himalayan panoramas
highlights: Sunrise and panoramic view of Annapurna and Machhapuchhre from Sarangkot
Scenic boating on Phewa Lake and visit to Tal Barahi Temple
Visit local Pokhara attractions: Davis Falls, Gupteshwor Cave, and World Peace Pagoda
description: A quick, beautiful getaway to Lakeside Pokhara, featuring spectacular Himalayan sunrises from Sarangkot, boating on Phewa Lake, and local city tours.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Pokhara and Lakeside Exploration
itinerary.desc: Arrive in Pokhara by flight or drive. Boating on Phewa Lake, visit Tal Barahi temple, and lakeside walk.

itinerary.title: Pokhara Sightseeing
itinerary.desc: Sarangkot sunrise. Visit Davis Falls, Gupteshwor Cave, Seti Gorge, Mountain Museum, and Peace Pagoda.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Pokhara Airport or Tourist Bus Park for your onward journey.
